notes: Developer payments/invoices/storage observability lifecycle now has real Chrome coverage: payment keyword/status filter plus API read-back; invoice create and issue plus API read-back; developer-only API 403 checks; storage summary, tenant list, and file list after a real enterprise upload. Full Chrome smoke is now 21/21. Inventory alert / 库存预警 remains explicitly out of scope and must not be restored. Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
